title: pelargonium aequaliflorum
intro: Pelargonium aequaliflorum, also known as the equal-flowered geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium aequaliflorum include relief from nausea, vomiting, and headaches, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in herbal medicine to soothe the digestive system and reduce inflammation.
